{"code":";; Step 1: Get all merged pull requests
(def merged-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

;; Step 2: Filter PRs that close Linear issues
(def prs-with-linear (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))

;; Step 3: Extract unique Linear issue IDs
(def linear-ids (distinct (map :closes_linear prs-with-linear)))
